subject: A harpy — winged creature with feathered wings and clawed hands — swooping through a sickly yellow-green sky
description: A large winged figure dives forward through a murky yellow-green atmosphere. Its wings are dark — deep purple-black with star-like speckles visible on the inner surfaces. Its clawed hands are outstretched toward the viewer; its face is gaunt and grimacing, with wild green-tinted hair or feathered crests at the head. The overall silhouette is harpy-like: part humanoid torso, part bird. The background has a sickly luminous glow, with tangled dark organic elements at the bottom of the frame.
foreground: Dark-winged harpy diving forward, claws extended, face twisted in aggression
background: Sickly yellow-green haze; dark organic forms below
emotion: aggression and menace — open-mouthed grimace, claws reaching forward
